helpSupport.faq1Q: How do I add a subscription?
helpSupport.faq1A: Go to the Subscriptions tab and tap the '+ Add' button. Fill in the name, price, billing cycle and category.
helpSupport.faq2A: Yes. On the Subscriptions tab, tap the pencil icon on any subscription to edit its details.
helpSupport.faq3A: Weekly subscriptions are annualised (x52/12), yearly subscriptions are divided by 12, and monthly ones are taken as-is.
helpSupport.faq4Q: Will my data be saved if I uninstall the app?
helpSupport.faq4A: Yes. Your data is stored securely on our server, so reinstalling the app and logging in restores everything.
helpSupport.faq5Q: How do I get renewal alerts?
helpSupport.faq5A: Go to Profile > Notification Preferences and enable Renewal Alerts. You will be notified before any subscription renews.
helpSupport.faq6Q: How do I delete my account?
helpSupport.faq6A: Go to Profile > Account Settings and scroll to the bottom. Tap 'Delete Account' and confirm. You can also email Trimio@subtrimio.com.
helpSupport.footerNote: Trimio@subtrimio.com is our official support address - yes, the domain is "subtrimio.com" even though the app is called Trimio.

referFriend.title: Give a month, get a month
referFriend.desc: Share your code with a friend. When they sign up and verify their email, you both get 1 month of Premium free.

referFriend.codeAppliedMsg: Verify your email (if you haven't already) to unlock your free month.

They do not unlock any additional features.
